title: The Securing of the Dorel-Hamton Pass
summary: The northway road connecting Hamton to Dorel routes has been effectively closed. A company of mercenaries - origin unknown - has established a toll post at the pass. No violence has yet been reported, but no goods have moved in a fortnight. The Hamton council has petitioned the House to resolve the blockade.
completion: The pass is cleared and the road declared open by the Hamton council's representative.
reward: 65gp, split on confirmation of safe passage
